# ToolNestr

> Free, fast and private online tools — calculators, converters, and text, image, PDF, developer and SEO utilities. Everything runs in the browser with no sign-up and no data leaving the device.

ToolNestr hosts 700+ single-purpose tools grouped into categories. Each tool page explains the formula or method it uses, cites authoritative sources for YMYL topics (finance, health), and carries a "last reviewed" date. Tools are built and checked against published standards (e.g. IRS brackets, standard BMI/BMR formulas, IEEE/NIST constants) before release.

## Flagship tools

- [Dropspot — instant local file sharing](https://toolnestr.com/tools/dropspot/)
- [SEO Analyzer](https://toolnestr.com/tools/seo-analyzer/)
- [IP Tracker](https://toolnestr.com/tools/ip-tracker/)

## Notes

- Sitemap: https://toolnestr.com/sitemap-index.xml
- All tools are free and run client-side; no account or payment is required.
